content: Can more easily enable further burst turns where you already have all of the necessary Cards available for play or even allow you to fight back immediately in cases where you shouldn't be able to like with a bricked Hand
Okay, good to know!
I guess then, should I focus on unlocking stuff related to characters I might be interested in building in the future, with reality verges, if there isn’t anything else quite to focus on?
Yeah, that's a viable option. Completing the necessary Side Stories in advance to obtain their Posse Skills
As the Reality Verges will constantly be refreshed so long as you complete the Daily Quests
And besides, who knows when the Awakeners in question will be released another time anyways

When you press on your Main Story, there are options underneath to unlock Side Stories known as Psyche Deepdive, Special OPs, Dreamscape and Multiversal Link in this order
They can cost as little as 3 Reality Verges each or as much as 7
And in occasion where there are certain Events that are active, you'll be able to unlock the relevant Side Stories for absolutely 0 Cost
Is it better to farm the event with 50% bonus or interlude?

It's always best to farm events

is there anything akin to hsr's endgame content where you need multiple teams in this game? or is 1 good team all you need for everything, and having alternates is just helpful for stages/fights with clear weaknesses

The main endgame content is dtide. That requires 5 teams minimum (you can borrow one character from a friend for one of the teams). Rewards for tdide are generally frontloaded so new players can get the pull currency without a lot of issues by clearing the waves at lower alert levels.
ah, so lots of teams needed, but should probably focus on building teams up to a strong level before making another one?

Yeah, that sounds like a reasonable plan. You are always going to want a "main story team" to clear story and events with, but you should also plan on leveling other units and teams so you can do dtide better. 

For what it is worth, the lower alert levels of dtide are very easy so you can really clear them as long as your characters are "mostly leveled" as soon as you unlock dtide. The higher alert levels are usually pretty difficult and will require a lot more thinking about which characters/wheels you bring to the fight.

If you haven't checked out mochette yet, make sure you pick up the free copy from the event. She is really good and flexible in dtide.
